dj_text: Rick Astley - Never gonna give you up (Medieval kind of version) fades. Avicii - Wake me up (Medieval version) emerges. Let it wash over you. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Attention, all ye medieval minstrels and feudal folk!
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Avicii - Wake me up (Medieval version)
